response.justification: Experienced fullstack engineer with 15+ years across the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq. Strong background in testing/TDD, cloud (AWS CDK), containerization, and multiple databases (MongoDB, MySQL). Gaps exist around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and Kotlin is not listed, but the breadth and seniority compensate well.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack with current TS/Node.js + React production experience
Direct AI agent / MCP infrastructure work matching a key required skill
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin missing from skills; Java experience is dated (pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less depth in the modern TS ecosystem than tenure suggests
